commands.command: var keys = Object.keys(obj); for (var i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) { var key = keys[i]; /* use obj[key] */ }
commands.description: Fix issue with 'for...in' loop iteration order
commands.scenario: Fix issue with 'for...in' loop iteration order

commands.command: if (!Array.prototype.indexOf) { Array.prototype.indexOf = function(elt) { var len = this.length >>> 0; var from = Number(arguments[1]) || 0; from = (from < 0) ? Math.ceil(from) : Math.floor(from); if (from < 0) from += len; for (; from < len; from++) { if (from in this && this[from] === elt) return from; } return -1; }; }
commands.description: Fix 'indexOf' method not available on arrays
commands.scenario: Fix 'indexOf' method not available on arrays

commands.description: Prevent IE from treating inline elements as block
commands.scenario: Prevent IE from treating inline elements as block

commands.command: (function() { var element = document.getElementById('element'); element.onclick = function() { /* do something */ }; })();
var fragment = document.createDocumentFragment(); for (var i = 0; i < 1000; i++) { var div = document.createElement('div'); fragment.appendChild(div); } document.body.appendChild(fragment);
